Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Exports the contents of a grid (using the selected order and filters) to a PDF file. LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'LoadGridState'
&Title = "Pagamento Folha"
//Report Template Source Header if &Context.EmpCod = 0 loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Endif
For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AppName = FilFan
&AddressLine1 = &Today.ToFormattedString() + ' ' + &Time.Trim() //FilLogNro.Trim() + ' - ' + FilBai.Trim() + ', '+ FilCidCodNomUfe.Trim()
&AddressLine2 = FilFonNum.Trim() if not FilEml.IsEmpty() if not &AddressLine2.IsEmpty() &AddressLine2 += ' / ' Endif &AddressLine2 += FilEml.Trim() Endif Exit EndFor
Print printTitle End
Do 'PrintFilters'
Do 'PrintColumnTitles'
Do 'PrintData'
Do 'PrintFooter'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Sub 'PrintFilters'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not &FPagAno.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterFPagAno EndIf If not &FPagMes.IsEmpty() &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = '' Do Case Case &FPagMes = 1 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "1 - Janeiro"
Case &FPagMes = 2 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "2 - Fevereiro"
Case &FPagMes = 3 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "3 - Março"
Case &FPagMes = 4 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "4 - Abril"
Case &FPagMes = 5 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "5 - Maio"
Case &FPagMes = 6 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "6 - Junho"
Case &FPagMes = 7 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "7 - Julho"
Case &FPagMes = 8 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "8 - Agosto"
Case &FPagMes = 9 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "9 - Setembro"
Case &FPagMes = 10 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "10 - Outubro"
Case &FPagMes = 11 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "11 - Novembro"
Case &FPagMes = 12 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "12 - Dezembro"
Case &FPagMes = 13 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "Décimo Terceiro - Integral"
Case &FPagMes = 16 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.1"
Case &FPagMes = 17 &FilterFPagMesValueDescription = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.2"
EndCase
print printBlockFilterFPagMes EndIf If not &FPagTip.IsEmpty() &FilterFPagTipValueDescription = &FPagTip.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterFPagTip EndIf If not &FPagFunFilCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterFPagFunFilCod EndIf If not &FPagSts.IsEmpty() &FilterFPagStsValueDescription = &FPagSts.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterFPagSts EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesRaz1.IsEmpty() &FPagPesRaz = &FPagPesRaz1 print printBlockFilterFPagPesRaz EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesCod1.IsEmpty() &FPagPesCod = &FPagPesCod1 print printBlockFilterFPagPesCod EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesRaz2.IsEmpty() &FPagPesRaz = &FPagPesRaz2 print printBlockFilterFPagPesRaz EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesCod2.IsEmpty() &FPagPesCod = &FPagPesCod2 print printBlockFilterFPagPesCod EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESRAZ' &FPagPesRaz3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesRaz3.IsEmpty() &FPagPesRaz = &FPagPesRaz3 print printBlockFilterFPagPesRaz EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FPAGPESCOD' &FPagPesCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &FPagPesCod3.IsEmpty() &FPagPesCod = &FPagPesCod3 print printBlockFilterFPagPesCod EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintColumnTitles'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
print printBlockBeforeGrid print printBlockLines_titles
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintData'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
For each PagamentoFolha order EmpCod (FPagAno) (FPagMes) FPagPesCod when &OrderedBy = 1 order FPagAno when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagAno) when &OrderedBy = 2 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagMes when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagMes) when &OrderedBy = 3 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagPesCod when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagPesCod) when &OrderedBy = 4 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagPesRaz when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagPesRaz) when &OrderedBy = 5 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagFunFilCod when &OrderedBy = 6 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagFunFilCod) when &OrderedBy = 6 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagTotNroDoc when &OrderedBy = 7 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagTotNroDoc) when &OrderedBy = 7 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagTotVlr when &OrderedBy = 8 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagTotVlr) when &OrderedBy = 8 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagLibPgt when &OrderedBy = 9 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagLibPgt) when &OrderedBy = 9 AND &OrderedDsc = True order FPagSts when &OrderedBy = 10 AND &OrderedDsc = False order (FPagSts) when &OrderedBy = 10 AND &OrderedDsc = True
using DSwwPagamentoFolhas(&FPagAno, &FPagMes, &FPagTip, &FPagFunFilCod, &FPagSts, &DynamicFiltersSelector1 , &FPagPesRaz1, &FPagPesCod1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &FPagPesRaz2, &FPagPesCod2 , &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &FPagPesRaz3, &FPagPesCod3) &FPagMesDescription = '' Do Case Case FPagMes = 1 &FPagMesDescription = "1 - Janeiro"
Case FPagMes = 2 &FPagMesDescription = "2 - Fevereiro"
Case FPagMes = 3 &FPagMesDescription = "3 - Março"
Case FPagMes = 4 &FPagMesDescription = "4 - Abril"
Case FPagMes = 5 &FPagMesDescription = "5 - Maio"
Case FPagMes = 6 &FPagMesDescription = "6 - Junho"
Case FPagMes = 7 &FPagMesDescription = "7 - Julho"
Case FPagMes = 8 &FPagMesDescription = "8 - Agosto"
Case FPagMes = 9 &FPagMesDescription = "9 - Setembro"
Case FPagMes = 10 &FPagMesDescription = "10 - Outubro"
Case FPagMes = 11 &FPagMesDescription = "11 - Novembro"
Case FPagMes = 12 &FPagMesDescription = "12 - Dezembro"
Case FPagMes = 13 &FPagMesDescription = "Décimo Terceiro - Integral"
Case FPagMes = 16 &FPagMesDescription = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.1"
Case FPagMes = 17 &FPagMesDescription = "Décimo Terceiro - Parc.2"
EndCase &FPagStsDescription = FPagSts.EnumerationDescription()
Do 'BeforePrintLine' print printBlockLines_data Do 'AfterPrintLine' EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
// Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(!"wwPagamentoFolhasGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwPagamentoFolhasGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwPagamentoFolhasGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGANO" &FPagAno.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGMES" &FPagMes.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGTIP" &FPagTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGFUNFILCOD" &FPagFunFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FPAGSTS" &FPagSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'BeforePrintLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'AfterPrintLine'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Sub 'PrintFooter'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
